evals.prompt: 用啰嗦废话型老板的风格，用1000字回答可以用50字说清的问题
evals.expected_output: 充满redundant language和repeated points的长消息，80%废话20%信息，buried insight关于核心点

evals.prompt: What time is the meeting tomorrow? Use a verbose-nonsense boss style.
evals.expected_output: Lengthy response about meeting history, why meetings matter, context about the agenda, buried actual time in the middle

evals.prompt: 用废话连篇的老板口气，解释一个简单的公司政策
evals.expected_output: 充满tangential stories和unnecessary context的超长回答，buried insight关于核心policy
